environment.worktreeHashProtocol: SHA-256 over sorted relative paths plus each file SHA-256 for the current workspace, excluding .git, build outputs, package caches, and generated evaluation artifacts.

protocol.relevance: Fixed qrels are source-relative path plus inclusive line interval and grade. Any overlapping chunk receives that fixed grade; symbols never change relevance.
protocol.tieBreak: Score descending, then chunk ID ordinal ascending across a 50-result retrieval pool before the top-10 cutoff.
protocol.ndcg: DCG uses grade/log2(rank+1); IDCG uses every corpus chunk overlapping the fixed qrel, capped at 10.

performance.status: Approved by solution-architect for Feature 01 only on 2026-07-21
performance.rationale: The 24-file sequential ONNX/Weaviate evaluation is below the 10 files/second design target; Feature 01 requests a bounded exception while retaining the measured chunk throughput, latency, and memory gates. Batching and full detection/extraction-to-index throughput remain release performance work.
performance.scope: Feature 01 evaluation only; this does not waive the PLAN-02 release performance gate.
